overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western game showing a character walking through a foggy, rain-soaked frontier town at night. The character passes wooden buildings, horse-drawn carriages, and encounters a rider on horseback as rain begins to fall.

parked wooden carriage with large wheels on the muddy street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
single-story wooden building with large windows and porch

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a foggy, gas-lit street in an Old West town. Wooden buildings with balconies line the left side while parked carriages sit along the muddy cobblestone road. The warm glow of street lamps cuts through the misty night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with tram tracks and wooden facades

events.description: rain begins falling and lightning flashes in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as rain begins to fall, walking along visible tram tracks

weathered wooden building with shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the weather changes and rain begins to fall. The street features embedded tram tracks, and the gas lamps continue to provide warm illumination against the darkening, wet conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area with green tarped building and construction site

events.description: rider on horseback passes by from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain toward a building covered in green tarp while a rider on horseback passes by

wooden scaffolding structure surrounding an unfinished building
tall wooden plank fence running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking in heavy rain toward a distinctive building covered in green tarp. A rider on horseback gallops past on the right, and wooden scaffolding of a construction site becomes visible on the left side of the muddy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with saloon and active construction site

agents.ego_description: continuing past the green building and construction site toward figures standing near a saloon entrance

notable_agents.action: two men standing on the porch of the saloon observing the street

unfinished wooden building frame with scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the green-tarped building and continues alongside a construction site. A wooden saloon with a balcony appears on the left where two men stand on the porch, and the rain continues to fall on the muddy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy frontier town that gradually transforms into a rain-drenched construction zone. It begins on a gas-lit street where the warm glow of lamps cuts through a misty night air, passing wooden balconies and carriages parked along muddy cobblestones. As the character advances, the weather shifts and rain begins to fall, slicking the embedded tram tracks and darkening the atmosphere. The scene then intensifies into heavy rain as a rider on horseback gallops past, leading the camera toward a building covered in green tarp and the wooden scaffolding of a nearby construction site. Finally, the movement continues past the tarped structure to reveal a wooden saloon where two men stand on a porch overlooking the rain-soaked street.
